title: oplismenus dubius
intro: Oplismenus dubius is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of false bornemary or false borne poppy. It is native to parts of Asia and Europe, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve coughs. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which make it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems like constipation and indigestion. In herbal preparations, Oplismenus dubius is often used as a powder or decoction to treat various health issues, and is sometimes combined with other herbs for enhanced therapeutic effects.
